_note: Externally verified (dereferenced) SEMICeu / W3C vocabulary terms referenced by SKOS mappings or rdfs:seeAlso. scripts/check-mappings.ts fails on any cv:/cccev:/locn:/adms:/cpsv:/foaf:/legal:/org: mapping target not listed here - dereference the IRI (Accept: text/turtle) and add it once verified. cv:LegalEntity famously does NOT exist (use legal:LegalEntity).
